title: Critical Care Nurses
description: Provide specialized nursing care for patients in critical or coronary care units.

tasks.text: Evaluate patients' vital signs or laboratory data to determine emergency intervention needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor patients for changes in status and indications of conditions such as sepsis or shock and institute appropriate interventions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer medications intravenously, by injection, orally, through gastric tubes, or by other methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor patients' fluid intake and output to detect emerging problems, such as fluid and electrolyte imbalances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prioritize nursing care for assigned critically ill patients, based on assessment data or identified needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile and analyze data obtained from monitoring or diagnostic tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct pulmonary assessments to identify abnormal respiratory patterns or breathing sounds that indicate problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assess patients' pain levels or sedation requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other health care professionals to develop and revise treatment plans, based on identified needs and assessment data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document patients' medical histories and assessment findings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect specimens for laboratory tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and monitor medical equipment and devices such as cardiac monitors, mechanical ventilators and alarms, oxygen delivery devices, transducers, or pressure lines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Administer blood and blood products, monitoring patients for signs and symptoms related to transfusion reactions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advocate for patients' and families' needs, or provide emotional support for patients and their families.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess family adaptation levels and coping skills to determine whether intervention is needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Perform approved therapeutic or diagnostic procedures, based upon patients' clinical status.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist physicians with procedures such as bronchoscopy, endoscopy, endotracheal intubation, or elective cardioversion.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise and monitor unit nursing staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify malfunctioning equipment or devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Document patients' treatment plans, interventions, outcomes, or plan revisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify patients at risk of complications due to nutritional status.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess patients' psychosocial status and needs, including areas such as sleep patterns, anxiety, grief, anger, and support systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify patients' age-specific needs and alter care plans as necessary to meet those needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in professional organizations and continuing education to improve practice knowledge and skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in the development, review, or evaluation of nursing practice protocols.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate patient care conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide post-mortem care.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, provide, or evaluate educational programs for nursing staff, interdisciplinary health care team members, or community members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Ensure that equipment or devices are properly stored after use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
